# Security Policy — icodeforyou_flutter

## Reporting a Vulnerability
If you discover a security issue, report it privately to the maintainers.

## Supported Areas
We review security concerns related to:
- packages
- plugins
- shared infrastructure
- authentication
- payment flows
- platform channels

## Not Supported
We do not review security issues inside `/programs/*` because they are experimental.

## Expectations
Provide:
- clear description of the issue
- steps to reproduce
- potential impact
- suggested mitigation if known
